description: Batch 004 operational index for CMP116 Eq. (2.31) source-package live fields, refreshed after repository HEAD 1fed14e and visually rechecked after HEAD 4432292 and b85079a. This is navigation metadata only and does not promote primary-source status.

repo_operational_crosswalk.title: LLM-facing source-to-Lean dependency crosswalk for THE-ERIKSSON-PROGRAMME
repo_operational_crosswalk.author: Generated source-db batch 002
repo_operational_crosswalk.license_note: Repository metadata only; not a mathematical source. Use to navigate primary source entries, not as proof.

citations.summary: Batch 004 live-field matrix for CMP116Eq231BalabanPFamilySourcePackage after HEAD b85079a: focus on remaining source-native fields rather than more routing.
extracted_claims: HEAD 8b98c43 added a one-way carrier projection theorem from bond_fst_mem_gapCubes to source_subset_gapCarrier.
The next useful commit should discharge mem_iff_source, admissible_iff_source, or the source-shaped positive-tail bond_fst_mem_gapCubes premise.
The source package is the right bottleneck: downstream Eq. (2.31) filtered-P propagation already exists.
Lean now names the one-field positive-tail ownership target as the honest fallback when the source does not support a full eligible-bond iff.

Lean now splits the CMP116 page-12 interior/no-boundary source clause into CMP116Eq231InteriorBoundaryAdmissibilitySource, leaving only the geometric dictionary from those predicates to gapCubes as the carrier blocker.
The source package can now be built directly from the interior/no-boundary split plus that geometric dictionary, without requiring callers to prepackage CMP116Eq231PositiveTailOwnershipSource.
HEAD 1fed14e routes the filtered-family and scale-family Eq. (2.31) consumers through CMP116Eq231PositiveTailOwnershipSource; the source theorem itself remains pending.
Direct local source-text search still supports only the interior/no-boundary split and the Z0\Y0 gap/count discussion, not the Lean first-coordinate/base-cube dictionary.

Visual recheck after HEAD 4432292 of cmp116-source-12-eq25-28.png, cmp116-source-18.png, cmp116-source-19.png, and cmp109-source-19-b0-corridor-19.png confirms the same boundary: no render proves that Lean's first coordinate b.1 is the positive tail/base cube in Z0\Y0.

The two-premise bridge is named CMP116Eq231InteriorBoundaryToGapSource: interior and boundary-disjoint encoded bonds have first coordinate in gapCubes. This is a sufficient Lean interface, not a discharged theorem.
Post-57875f1 audit corrected the active source target: interior/no-boundary alone does not exclude bonds inside Y0, so the source-lock must keep explicit membership in Y0^{c,*}.
Lean now names the corrected carrier-explicit bridge as CMP116Eq231Y0cStarInteriorBoundaryToGapSource and the corresponding source-admissibility split as CMP116Eq231FullCarrierAdmissibilitySource.

formulas.ascii: new downstream wrappers = cosmetic unless they remove one live source field

use_for: Orient LLM agents immediately to live source-package fields.
Prevent another round of consumer-only wrappers.
do_not_use_for: Do not treat this operational card as primary-source evidence.
Do not promote source_pending entries without a rendered/PDF page check.
Do not add another downstream consumer when the blocker is a source-package field.
open_questions: Exact source-to-Lean geometric theorem proving CMP116Eq231Y0cStarInteriorBoundaryToGapSource: encoded P-bonds in Y0^{c,*} satisfying the page-12 interior/no-boundary clause have first coordinate in gapCubes.
Exact source definition of admissible.
Exact iff between PIndex membership and the source predicate.

citations.summary: Narrowest high-payoff field: prove that every encoded source P-bond has first coordinate in gapCubes.
extracted_claims: This is smaller than proving the full P-family membership iff.
It should be sourced from the eligible-bond carrier/orientation sentence rather than from the Eq. (2.31) entropy display.
If proved, source_subset_gapCarrier disappears without requiring admissible_iff_source.
The positive-tail ownership record narrows the current source request to one theorem: every bond in a source-admissible P has first coordinate in gapCubes.
CMP116 page 12 supports a smaller source-side split: source-admissible P-bonds are interior to Z0 and boundary-disjoint; Lean records this as CMP116Eq231InteriorBoundaryAdmissibilitySource.
The remaining blocker is the source-to-Lean geometric dictionary turning Y0^{c,*} membership plus those interior/no-boundary predicates into first-coordinate membership in gapCubes.
Lean retains CMP116Eq231InteriorBoundaryToGapSource as a sufficient two-premise dictionary, but post-57875f1 source audit shows it is too strong as the active source target.
Lean now names the corrected source dictionary as CMP116Eq231Y0cStarInteriorBoundaryToGapSource and exposes cmp116Eq231_y0cStarInteriorBoundary_to_gapCubes_of_source as its projection theorem.
The package-level interior-boundary constructor feeds the source package through the narrower split and keeps the geometric dictionary explicit.

formulas.ascii: sourceAdmissible(Z,D,P) -> b in P -> b.1 in gapCubes(Z,D)

formulas.statement: Existing Lean projection theorem consumes this premise.
formulas.ascii: bond_fst_mem_gapCubes -> P subset gapCubes(Z,D) x Fin 4
formulas.conclusion: Existing Lean projection theorem consumes this premise.

use_for: Best next small theorem when source windows only support orientation/carrier inclusion.
Translate CMP109 positive-oriented bonds into Cube x Fin 4 ownership only with a CMP116 eligible-carrier bridge.
do_not_use_for: Do not treat this operational card as primary-source evidence.
Do not promote source_pending entries without a rendered/PDF page check.
Do not add another downstream consumer when the blocker is a source-package field.
Do not use the lower bound |P| >= (1/2)*M^-4*|Z0\Y0| to prove carrier inclusion.
open_questions: Exact source-to-Lean geometric theorem CMP116Eq231Y0cStarInteriorBoundaryToGapSource: encoded P-bonds in Y0^{c,*}, interior to Z0, and boundary-disjoint have first coordinate in gapCubes.
Does CMP116 state the eligible bond is based in Z0\Y0 or merely intersects it?
Does positive orientation assign the tail b_- to the Lean first coordinate?

citations.summary: Full membership field: identify Balaban P-family membership with sourceAdmissible over encoded finite bond sets.
extracted_claims: This field is stronger than carrier inclusion and should wait for the exact CMP116 definition of the P-family.
The admissible predicate must not be a vacuous decide(P in PIndex) definition.
The theorem must give both directions: every source P is encoded/admissible and every encoded admissible P appears in the source family.

formulas.conclusion: Existing equality bridge after source predicate is related to carrier/admissible.

citations.summary: Admissibility field: replace an opaque admissible predicate by source conditions without vacuity.
extracted_claims: This field is distinct from mem_iff_source: it explains the Bool admissible used by the filtered Lean family.
Likely source clauses: P bonds in interior of Z0, not intersecting dZ0, and Z0 smallest localization domain containing Y0 and P.
The theorem is source-honest only if all clauses and quantifier dependencies are recorded.

formulas.ascii: admissible may mention source clauses, not P in PIndex as its definition

Do not hide membership or carrier containment inside admissible unless the source defines it that way.

Need quantifier dependencies on fixed Z0,Y0,D/P stage.

citations.summary: No-more-routing guard: downstream Eq. (2.31) propagation is saturated; new work must remove a live source hypothesis.
extracted_claims: Filtered-P and source-package routes already exist downstream.
Batch 003 proof cards are operational metadata, not source theorem proofs.
HEAD 8b98c43 adds a projection theorem, but it still needs the source-shaped premise.

open_questions: Need review rule: every Eq. (2.31) commit must name the live hypothesis removed.
Need CI/oracle check linked to target declarations.

citations.summary: Precise source-extraction request: CMP116 page 12 candidate for chi_k decomposition and P-bond carrier.
extracted_claims: Existing OCR candidate is useful but not theorem-feedable enough for the membership iff.
The extractor must produce a bounded quote/paraphrase with symbol dictionary and page image hash.
If the text only says a bond intersects the gap, the factor may be 8 rather than 4 and must be recorded honestly.

sourceAdmissible(Z,D,P) -> b in P -> b.1 in gapCubes(Z,D) OR explain why not derivable
